mapper.select: SELECT COURSE_NO AS courseNo , COURSE_NM AS courseNm , COURSE_INFO AS courseInfo , COURSE_PATH_NM AS coursePathNm , COURSE_DSTNC AS courseDstnc , COURSE_REQ_TM AS courseReqTm FROM COURSE WHERE COURSE_NO = #{courseNo}

SELECT A.*, B.TOTAL_CNT AS totalCnt FROM ( SELECT TT1.* FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RNUM, T1.* FROM ( SELECT COURSE_NO AS courseNo , COURSE_NM AS courseNm , COURSE_INFO AS courseInfo , COURSE_PATH_NM AS coursePathNm , COURSE_DSTNC AS courseDstnc , COURSE_REQ_TM AS courseReqTm FROM COURSE WHERE 1=1
AND COURSE_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchWord} || '%'
ORDER BY COURSE_NO DESC
ORDER BY COURSE_NO DESC
) T1 WHERE ROWNUM <= #{pageSize} * (#{pageNo} - 1) + #{pageSize} ) TT1 WHERE RNUM >= #{pageSize} * (#{pageNo} - 1) + 1 ) A CROSS JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_CNT FROM COURSE WHERE 1=1
AND COURSE_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchWord} || '%'
) B
mapper.insert:
SELECT 0 FROM DUAL
SELECT 1 FROM DUAL
